base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of coin_block_initial — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Initial state of coin-yielding ?-block (pre-hit) — yellow question-block tile with '?' glyph. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Initial state of coin-yielding ?-block (pre-hit) — yellow question-block tile with '?' glyph; appears in Overworld/Underwater palette column and Underground/Castle palette column
